summary: Implemented US-846 deterministic full-bullet smoke coverage by activating a real harness smoke scenario that reaches phase=finished with the live engine and heuristic AI, adding explicit finished-state termination and legalCount diagnostics, and preserving adjacent rule-critical suites. Targeted regression and fresh npm run verify both passed.

tests_run.evidence: Read active PERSONAL project/default component scope before Spexus artifact reads.
Confirmed MZ-602 owns integration-test implementation for PERSONAL-US-846 deterministic full-bullet smoke coverage.

tests_run.command: npm test -- src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/domain/engine.test.ts src/domain/rules.test.ts
tests_run.evidence: 41 tests passed across the new smoke coverage, harness diagnostics, heuristic AI legality, engine transitions, and rules validation.
Vitest passed 14 files / 137 tests, then tsc and vite build completed successfully.

verification_commands: npm test -- src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/domain/engine.test.ts src/domain/rules.test.ts

evidence_matrix.scenario: US-846 suite includes executable deterministic smoke coverage in addition to the existing rule/AI/unit/integration inventory.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Smoke scenario uses deterministic seed 639 with bulletTarget 1 to keep the full-bullet completion executable and bounded.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Rule-critical engine/rules/AI paths remain green after harness changes.
evidence_matrix.command_or_source: npm test -- src/test/integrationHarness.test.ts src/test/aiDecision.integration.test.ts src/ai/heuristicAi.test.ts src/domain/engine.test.ts src/domain/rules.test.ts
evidence_matrix.limitations: This worker touched integration/harness coverage only and relied on existing adjacent suites for the remaining AC-2430 categories.

evidence_matrix.scenario: Deterministic full-bullet smoke reaches finished without unhandled error, illegal AI action, or stuck progression and respects an explicit step bound.
evidence_matrix.limitations: Progress is asserted from consecutive trace deltas and bounded by fixtureDeals.fullBulletSmoke.maxSteps = 80.

quality_gate_matrix.limitations: Scenario is intentionally minimal and deterministic rather than exhaustive across multiple smoke seeds.
Diagnostics focus on seed, step, phase, actor, legalCount, legal actions, chosen action, and recent trace.
Verification covers the current repo state in this worktree only.
